questionHtml: Explain the change in numbers of the cactus moth throughout the study period.
markschemeHtml:
1. (before 2002) the cactus moth had abundant food so the population grew exponentially;
  2. (after 2002) the population size fell as the amount of cactus plants decreased
    OR
    from 2003 low population of moths corresponds with low number of cladodes/cactus plants;

meta.title: Explain the change in numbers of the cactus moth throughout the study period.
breadcrumbLabels: B4.2.10. Adaptations of predators for finding, catching and killing prey and of prey animals for resisting predation
